name: Build a SaaS MVP from scratch
description: Orchestrates skills in sequence to build a complete SaaS MVP — from architecture design to production deploy.

steps.title: Define complete architecture
steps.prompt_template: Using SKILL-ARCHITECT-FIRST, define the complete architecture for {name}. Stack: {stack}. Target: {target}.

steps.title: Validate library choices
steps.prompt_template: Using SKILL-TECH-SEARCH, validate the best library choices for {stack} with a {target} product.

steps.title: Implement core product
steps.prompt_template: Implement the core of {name} following the approved architecture. Stack: {stack}.

steps.title: Validate before deploy
steps.prompt_template: Using SKILL-CHECKLIST-RUNNER, validate that {name} is ready for production deploy.

command_template:
We are building {name} — a {target} SaaS product.

Stack: {stack} | Auth: {auth} | Payments: {payments}

Mandatory execution sequence:

1. SKILL-ARCHITECT-FIRST → Document complete architecture before any code. Database schema, API contracts, component tree, auth flow, payment flow. Get approval before proceeding.

2. SKILL-TECH-SEARCH → Validate library choices for {stack}.

3. Implement core → Database schema first, then auth ({auth}), then business logic, then API routes, then UI.

4. Add {payments} → Subscriptions, webhooks, billing portal.

5. SKILL-CHECKLIST-RUNNER → Validate security, error handling, env vars, mobile, loading states before deploy.

Global rules: TypeScript always. Never write code without approved architecture. No hardcoded secrets.
author: fluxrow
